001package tools.PathplannerFlip;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
005import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
006
007import java.io.File;
008import java.io.IOException;
009import java.util.ArrayList;
010
011/**
012 *
013 *
014 * <h2>Flip paths of your choice across the y coordinate axis</h2>
015 *
016 * <p>
017 * To use, run:
018 *
019 * <pre>
020 * ./gradlew runPathplannerPathFlip -Pargs="[target paths]"
021 * </pre>
022 * 
023 * Split each paths you want to flip with ", "
024 * 
025 * <p>
026 * <b>Example:</b>
027 *
028 * <pre>
029 * ./gradlew runPathplannerPathFlip -Pargs="RB to Mid Neutral LF, Mid Neutral LF to RB Shoot"
030 * </pre>
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * <b>Arguments:</b>
034 *
035 * <ul>
036 * <li><b>[target paths]</b>: The paths to flip over the y axis.
037 * </ul>
038 */
039public class PathplannerPathFlip {
040    public static final double FIELD_HEIGHT = 8.0;
041    public static final String PATH_DIR = "./src/main/deploy/pathplanner/paths/";
042
043    public static final ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
044    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
045        if (args.length <= 0) {
046            System.err.println("Missing path argument.");
047            return;
048        }
049        flipPaths(args[0].split(", "));
050    }
051
052    public static boolean fileValid(File file) {
053        return file.exists() && file.isFile() && file.canRead();
054    }
055
056    public static String[] flipPaths(String ...paths) throws IOException {
057        final ArrayList<String> flippedPaths = new ArrayList<>();
058        for (String pathName : paths) {
059            final File pathFile = new File(PATH_DIR + pathName + ".path");
060            if (!fileValid(pathFile)) {
061                System.err.println(pathName + " - is NOT a valid path </3");
062                continue;
063            }
064
065            final ObjectNode pathObj = (ObjectNode) mapper.readTree(pathFile);
066
067            JsonNode waypoints = pathObj.path("waypoints");
068            if (waypoints.isMissingNode()) {
069                System.err.println("The path " + pathName + " is missing fields.");
070                continue;
071            }
072
073            for (JsonNode waypoint : waypoints) {
074                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "anchor");
075                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "prevControl");
076                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "nextControl");
077            }
078
079            JsonNode rotationTargets = pathObj.get("rotationTargets");
080            if (rotationTargets != null) {
081                for (JsonNode target : rotationTargets) {
082                    ObjectNode targetObj = (ObjectNode) target;
083                    double flipped = -targetObj.path("rotationDegrees").asDouble();
084                    targetObj.put("rotationDegrees", flipped);
085                }
086            }
087
088            JsonNode goalEndState = pathObj.get("goalEndState");
089            if (goalEndState != null) {
090                double flipped = -goalEndState.path("rotation").asDouble();
091                ((ObjectNode) goalEndState).put("rotation", flipped);
092            }
093
094            JsonNode idealStartingState = pathObj.get("idealStartingState");
095            if (idealStartingState != null) {
096                double flipped = -idealStartingState.path("rotation").asDouble();
097                ((ObjectNode) idealStartingState).put("rotation", flipped);
098            }
099
100            JsonNode pointTowardsZones = pathObj.get("pointTowardsZones");
101            if (pointTowardsZones != null) {
102                for (JsonNode zone : pointTowardsZones) {
103                    flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) zone, "fieldPosition");
104                }
105            }
106
107            final File flippedFile = new File(PATH_DIR + pathName + " Flipped.path");
108            mapper.writerWithDefaultPrettyPrinter().writeValue(flippedFile, pathObj);
109            System.out.println("Saved to " + pathName + " Flipped.path");
110            flippedPaths.add(pathName + " Flipped");
111        }
112        return flippedPaths.toArray(new String[0]);
113    }
114
115    public static void flipWaypoint(ObjectNode parent, String fieldName) {
116        JsonNode node = parent.get(fieldName);
117        if (node == null || node.isNull())
118            return;
119
120        ObjectNode point = (ObjectNode) node;
121        double flippedY = FIELD_HEIGHT - point.get("y").asDouble();
122        point.put("y", flippedY);
123    }
124}
